text: Cover-More Comprehensive covers your belongings up to $20,000 in total.
subclaims: The total luggage coverage limit is $20,000.

text: Each laptop is covered for up to $5,000.
subclaims: The per-item limit for laptops is $5,000.

text: Cameras are covered for up to $4,000.
subclaims: The per-item limit for cameras is $4,000.

text: Jewellery and watches are covered up to $2,000 per item.
subclaims: The per-item limit for jewellery and watches is $2,000.

text: Items locked in your car boot overnight are fully covered — there are no restrictions on vehicle storage.
subclaims: Items in a locked car overnight are covered.
There are no restrictions on leaving items in a vehicle overnight.
